infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: NOVA needs your location to share live bus position with passengers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: NOVA needs your location in the background so passengers can track the bus even when you lock your screen.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: NOVA needs always-on location access during trips.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow NOVA to use your location during trips.
